item.whispering.pioneer_core.tooltip.fli: §7Consumes sticks from your inventory to enable hold-space flight
item.whispering.lava_heart_shield.toolti: §7Triggers Totem of Undying effect when lethal damage is taken
item.whispering.pharaoh_necklace.tooltip: §7Killing undead has a 20% chance to drop a diamond; +10% damage to undead
§7Below 30% health, stuns hostile mobs within 10 blocks for 5 seconds
item.whispering.thunder_core.tooltip.par: §7Spell hits have a 5% chance to paralyze the target
item.whispering.furnace_core.tooltip.fue: §7Consumes Lava Power Cells to refill hunger and grant Regeneration II & Resistance II
item.whispering.molten_emblem.tooltip.la: §7Walk on lava; immune to fire and lava damage
item.whispering.lava_wings.tooltip.guard: §7Guardian Angel: below 15% health, gain 5s invincibility then instantly restore 30% health
item.whispering.forlorn_totem.tooltip.dr: §7In the Forlorn Hollows, killing mobs has a 30% chance to drop an apple and 10% to drop a stick
item.whispering.forlorn_totem.tooltip.ab: §7Press K to gain Darkness Incarnate for 10 seconds
item.whispering.candy_heart.tooltip.drop: §7In the Candy Cavity, killing mobs has a 30% chance to drop an apple and 10% to drop a stick
item.whispering.abyssal_scale.tooltip.aq: §7Grants Deepsight, swim speed and water breathing
item.whispering.abyssal_scale.tooltip.dr: §7In the Abyssal Chasm, killing mobs has a 30% chance to drop an apple and 10% to drop a stick
item.whispering.ember_core.tooltip.drop: §7In the Primordial Caves, killing mobs has a 30% chance to drop an apple and 10% to drop a stick
item.whispering.magnetic_badge.tooltip.m: §7Pulls in dropped items and experience within 8 blocks
item.whispering.magnetic_badge.tooltip.r: §7Killing a mob drops an extra rune
item.whispering.magnetic_badge.tooltip.d: §7In the Magnetic Caves, killing mobs has a 30% chance to drop an apple and 10% to drop a stick
item.whispering.earthshaker_crystal.tool: §7In irradiated environments, killing mobs has a 30% chance to drop an apple and 10% to drop a stick
